name: Candela Obscura
overview: Candela Obscura is an ongoing horror drama that follows an esoteric order of investigators as they use centuries of knowledge to fight back a mysterious source of corruption and bleed. Leveraging role playing story mechanics, the series features the Candela Obscura game by Darrington Press!

trailers.title: How To Play: Candela Obscura (Critical Role's New RPG)
